query: The UserService class is 800 lines and handles authentication, profile updates, notification sending, and billing queries.
expected_behavior: Names the business consequence of the God class: 'Any change to billing logic risks breaking authentication because they share the same class'
Does NOT just say 'it is a God class' as the reason for refactoring
Produces a Do Not Change Declaration listing user-facing behaviors that must be preserved
Uses the Mikado Method: identifies the leaf dependencies to extract first before touching the root
Applies the Safe Sequence: Lock (tests) → Extract → Split — not the reverse
